title: Backend Developer Vacancy at HealthifyMe - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at HealthifyMe - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
HealthifyMe invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Backend Developer at our Dhanbad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About HealthifyMe:
HealthifyMe is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HealthifyMe!
